add user cell add user cell You mentioned module instantiations work on the GHDL side, but that you did not add them to yosys yet. So I figured I'd try doing just that.

It seems to work with the *very* light testing I've done so far.

Things I'm not sure are correct:

* My handling of ports. I just copy-pasted the most trivial similar thing and nothing complained. So either it worked, it silently failed, or it only works in this trivial `and6` example.
* Blackboxes. If I omit the `and3`

It seems to work with the *very* light testing I've done so far.
